additional_rules.name: missing-outputs-config
additional_rules.message: Task has dependsOn but no outputs configured — Turborepo cannot cache task results without declared outputs
additional_rules.fix_hint: Add "outputs": ["dist/**"] (or appropriate output paths) to enable output caching for this task

additional_rules.name: wildcard-output-glob
additional_rules.message: Overly broad output glob (**) — cache will include unnecessary files, slowing cache restore
additional_rules.fix_hint: Narrow outputs to specific directories like ["dist/**", ".next/**"] instead of catching everything

additional_rules.name: direct-npm-script-in-ci
additional_rules.message: Direct package manager task invocation in CI — use turbo run to preserve caching and dependency ordering
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace with 'turbo run build' (or test/lint) to leverage Turborepo's caching and parallelism

additional_rules.name: missing-env-declaration
additional_rules.message: Environment variable access — verify it is declared in turbo.json env or globalEnv to ensure cache correctness
additional_rules.fix_hint: Add the environment variable to the appropriate task's env array in turbo.json, or to globalEnv if used by all tasks

additional_rules.name: cache-false-on-cacheable-task
additional_rules.message: Task has caching disabled — verify this is intentional (appropriate for dev servers, not for build/test/lint)
additional_rules.fix_hint: Remove cache: false if this is a build/test/lint task. Only disable cache for persistent dev tasks.
